settingsSubtitle: Manage system configuration, backup and update
settingsSystemLogoHint: Enter a public image URL for the system logo
settingsRetentionSubtitle: Configure how long audit and event logs are retained
settingsAuditRetentionHint: Logs older than this value will be automatically purged. Range: 1–3650 days.
settingsBackupSubtitle: Download a full backup of system configuration and data
settingsRestoreSubtitle: Restore system configuration from a backup file
settingsRestoreFileHint: Select a .zip or .json backup file exported from this system
settingsRestoreSuccess: System restored successfully. Please refresh the page.
settingsRestoreWarning: Restoring will overwrite current configuration. This action cannot be undone.
settingsRestoreConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? All current settings will be replaced.
settingsRestoreNoFile: Please select a backup file first.
settingsUpdateSubtitle: Check and apply system software updates
